title: quercus lanuginosa var. heterophylla
intro: Quercus lanuginosa var. heterophylla, also known as the Chinese white oak, is a plant species that belongs to the Fagaceae family and is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus lanuginosa var. heterophylla include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that promote overall health and well-being.
